front: What is enzyme kinetics and how does it relate to peptide substrates?
back: Enzyme kinetics studies reaction rates of enzymes with substrates. Michaelis-Menten: v = Vmax[S]/(Km+[S]). For peptide substrates: Km reflects binding affinity, kcat reflects catalytic efficiency, kcat/Km reflects specificity. Protease specificity pockets determine preferred cleavage sites.
